title: MiGuo's Weapon Collection
description: Replace some weapons or tools with 3D textures I created.
body:
# About
Replace some weapons or tools with 3D textures I created.

# Content
- Netherite Sword >>> "Primordial Jade Winged-Spear" from Genshin Impact

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is unofficial fanart. Neither I nor this resource pack have any affiliation with HoYoverse or Genshin Impact. All rights to the original designs belong to HoYoverse.
